high_win.name: High Win Main
high_win.description: Conservative route champion for safety-first scalp signals.

rules.activation: always available; prioritize when user wants highest modeled accuracy

profit_max.name: Profit Max Specialist
profit_max.description: Aggressive validated satellite fusion mode; much higher modeled profit but lower win rate than main champion.

rules.preferredUse: optional aggressive mode / profit-max labels / paper watchlist
rules.activation: not main default because win rate missed validation floor; usable as separate specialist

powerhour_momentum_whitelist.name: Powerhour Momentum Whitelist Specialist
powerhour_momentum_whitelist.description: Power-hour long momentum-acceleration route filtered to symbols where the 60d/5m edge held up; profit-style specialist, not main high-win champion.

rules.preferredUse: specialist overlay / watchlist route; requires forward proof before main promotion
rules.activation: power hour only, long only, momentum acceleration, whitelist symbols only

phase17_specialist_router.name: Phase17 Specialist Router
phase17_specialist_router.description: Multi-trigger specialist tournament: train/test/holdout route validation, conflict optimizer, stress slippage, and symbol/session specialists.

rules.preferredUse: watchlist specialist until forward proof confirms it
rules.activation: router chooses trigger/session/direction specialists by validated route
rules.forwardFeedback: routes with negative paper/live trust are quarantined or penalized before selection

phase19_champion_council.name: Champion Council Fusion
phase19_champion_council.description: Fusion router that retests exact $407k walk-forward highWin routes against Phase17 specialist routes, then selects overlap/high-win/profit-guarded council variants.

rules.preferredUse: paper/watchlist specialist until live TradingView alert evidence confirms it
rules.activation: use when Phase17 and $407k walk-forward specialists overlap or when blended holdout/stress survives

selectionRules.condition: User wants aggressive modeled profit and accepts lower win rate
Forward/paper performance of profit_max falls below 85% or loss streak > 2
Profit Max forward performance exceeds 90% with 120+ paper trades

noTradeBadges: Profit Max is watchlist-only until forward proof improves
Backtest/paper evidence required before main promotion
